title: onosma papillosa
intro: Onosma papillosa, also known as the woolly onosma, is a plant species belonging to the family Apocynaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Onosma papillosa are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, including eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or made into capsules to harness its medicinal properties.
